text.message: I’ll give you the next one blue, I cannot let it go rn sry
I’ve been extorted too many times
id consider it a deal not extortoin
Ummm. Not sure when u write that
I have a wheat for u now
The rob is red, you know that
I didn’t actually think you had one
Black you know what’s more sad?
wood is the most coveted resource rn
ill gladly do a 1f1 one time
Yeah well if you don’t consider red a threat I guess I should rob you?
he also has the 8 wheat so i thought it wasnt too bad
I will rob you next time and trade red
You clearly know something I don’t
idrk what ur talking ab, the trade was very beneficial for me
do what you think is best
You handed red a great trade
Give me my 3 ore back I’ll do whatever red
blue u need to buy devs
Can’t believe you handed red the game
dude one trade isnt the game
the game is not letting him win army
It’s the message that you don’t care
you should NEVER trade the leader after a mono like that it’s suicide
What do you double play for?
why are we feeding the game here
Red ur table talk is annoying
Blue needs to take road or black
I’ll do a road for a sheep wheat combo
So annoying how much you table talked red. I would have totally gone for black but you table talked hella
Gg red. Next time dont be annoying
